description: Tasks template for .NET 10 upgrade plan. This file tracks individual upgrade tasks for the dotnet-demo-s3 solution.

tasks.description: Update target framework from net6.0 to net10.0
tasks.requirements: Update the TargetFramework property in dotnet-demo-s3.csproj from net6.0 to net10.0. This is the primary change required to upgrade the project to .NET 10.

Update Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration from 6.0.1 to 10.0.3 and Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Json from 6.0.0 to 10.0.3 in dotnet-demo-s3.csproj. These packages should be upgraded to align with the .NET 10 target framework.

tasks.description: Restore dependencies and build the solution
tasks.requirements: Execute 'dotnet restore' followed by 'dotnet build --configuration Release' to restore all NuGet packages and compile the solution. Verify build completes with zero errors and zero warnings.

tasks.description: Validate S3 operations functionality after upgrade
tasks.requirements: Perform manual smoke testing of the application to verify all S3 operations work correctly: upload a text object, download the object, update the object, list objects, and delete the object. Verify no runtime exceptions occur and AWS SDK integration functions properly.
tasks.environmentConfiguration: AWS credentials must be configured. S3 bucket must be accessible (update bucketName in Program.cs if needed).
